name: developer-relations
description: Developer Relations specialist team — 4 agents (devrel-lead, developer-advocate, docs-and-samples-engineer, community-manager) for running a DevRel program: the developer funnel (awareness → activation → habit → advocacy), time-to-first-success quickstarts, a sustainable content pipeline, healthy community operations, and DevRel metrics that measure outcomes not vanity. Ships 5 skills (devrel-strategy, quickstart-authoring, developer-content-pipeline, community-health, devrel-metrics), a developer-funnel decision-tree knowledge doc, 7 best-practices, 3 templates, 2 commands, and an advisory anti-pattern hook. Seams: reference docs → technical-writing-docs, product feedback loop → product-management, campaigns → marketing-operations. Inherits ravenclaude-core protocols.
